name: hero_strings_arithmetic
prompt: Editorial illustration on warm cream background: an open notebook with rows of handwritten characters and digits flowing across the pages, some forming words and others forming long columns of numbers being added and multiplied in the classic long-division style. Beside the notebook, a string of beads or abacus-like counters represents digit positions. The scene has a scholarly, contemplative atmosphere — soft pencil marks, subtle ink shadows, no text visible, no labels, purely visual and atmospheric. Warm amber and slate-blue accents on cream parchment tones.
